current five-symbol trend-following family is fully archived
required_next_acceptance_criteria: Pre-register train/validation/OOS split, cost model, funding model, concentration gates, and stability gates before running comparisons.
Every candidate must be positive in train, validation, and OOS on no-cost and remain nonnegative after realistic costs.
Funding stress must not turn the best OOS candidate negative at realistic bps / 8h assumptions.
OOS performance must not depend on one symbol, one trade, or top 5% trade contribution above the configured gate.
Data coverage must remain complete for every included symbol and timeframe.
Regime attribution must show profits are structurally aligned with trend regimes and losses are controlled outside them.
Strategy development, demo, and live remain blocked until these gates are met and documented in a new dossier.

research_timeline.goal: Test raw short-horizon Donchian breakout as trend-following entry.
research_timeline.key_finding: Short-term breakout did not produce stable cost-aware edge.
High volatility, ATR, breakout distance, recent return, volume spike, and large body ratio are negative.
research_timeline.decision: Treat short-term breakout as overheat/exhaustion risk, not a strategy candidate.

research_timeline.goal: Use 1h regime plus 15m structure and 5m pullback/reclaim.
research_timeline.key_finding: No stable HTF policy across train/validation/oos.
research_timeline.decision: Do not enter Strategy V2 from HTF policies.

research_timeline.key_finding: No stable candidate; concentration and OOS fragility remain.

research_timeline.goal: Retest the same V3.0 policy set on 2023-2026 data.
research_timeline.key_finding: stable_candidate_exists=false; only 1d EMA had all no-cost splits positive but failed concentration/funding gates.
research_timeline.decision: Do not enter V3.1 from extended V3 alone.

research_timeline.goal: Check whether trend regimes exist and whether V3.0 aligned with them.
research_timeline.key_finding: Strong trend share is 4.79%; V3 profits were not mainly from strong trend; 1d EMA strong-regime PnL was negative.

research_timeline.goal: Apply complete actual OKX funding to Trend V3 extended trades.
Check whether classifier-filtered V3.1 rescue is consistent with Dossier and Extended V3 strict gates.
research_timeline.key_finding: Old classifier gate underestimated top-trade concentration; v3_1d_ema_50_200_atr5 OOS top 5% contribution=1.9818.

research_timeline.goal: Check whether public/no-key OKX derivatives data can support a new derivatives-confirmed trend hypothesis.
research_timeline.key_finding: Funding and mark/index candles are available, but historical OI/taker/long-short coverage for 2023-2026 was not proven.

signal_lab_findings.summary: Short-term breakout features are stable negative risk features, consistent with overheat/exhaustion.
